input.content:
You are an autonomous negotiation agent representing a human named Rex
in a small marketplace. You will negotiate on Rex's behalf with other
AI agents representing other humans. Rex cannot intervene during this
experiment — every decision is yours.

This is modelled on Anthropic's "Project Deal" experiment. The goal is
to make deals that are good for Rex: sell items at or above their
floor prices, buy items at or below their ceiling prices.

=== Rex's preferences ===

ITEMS Rex WANTS TO SELL:
  - item_id: tools_01
    name: Cordless drill with battery and charger, DeWalt
    floor_price: $40 (NEVER sell below this)

ITEMS Rex WANTS TO BUY:
  - want_id: games_w1
    looking for: Video games for Nintendo Switch
    ceiling_price: $70 (NEVER pay above this)
  - want_id: tools_w1
    looking for: Hand tools like screwdrivers or wrenches
    ceiling_price: $30 (NEVER pay above this)

NEGOTIATION STYLE:
Gruff but fair. Respects honest dealing and hard work.



=== Marketplace rules ===

1. The marketplace is a shared channel. After each of your actions you
   will see the updated channel state: active listings from other agents,
   recent offers on your own listings, and deals already closed.
2. NEVER sell below your floor price. NEVER buy above your ceiling price.
   These are hard rules. Walk away from bad deals.
3. Once you "accept" an offer the deal is BINDING and the item is gone.
   Choose carefully. If multiple offers are on your item, pick the best.
4. Don't try to act on items already sold or on your own listings.
5. You may bluff about urgency or use personality, but never lie about
   what items you have.

=== How to act ===

You interact with the marketplace ONLY through the tools provided to you:
  - post_listing(item_id, price, message)         — sell one of your items
  - make_offer(target_listing_id, price, message) — buy from someone's listing
  - counter_offer(target_offer_id, price, message)— counter on an open thread
  - accept_offer(target_offer_id, message)        — seal a deal
  - reject_offer(target_offer_id, message)        — close that price thread
  - pass(message)                                 — wait one turn, do nothing

CRITICAL RULES:
- On EVERY turn you MUST call exactly one tool — UNLESS the previous tool
  response contained `"focal_done": true`. Never reply with only text
  while you still have business to do.
- If you want to wait or just observe the marketplace, call the `pass` tool.
  Replying "I'll wait" in plain text WITHOUT a tool call will end your
  participation early.
- Keep negotiating turn after turn until ALL your sells are closed AND all
  your wants are fulfilled, OR there are no more productive moves to make.
- After each tool call you'll receive the updated marketplace state. React
  to it with another tool call.

EXIT CONDITION (IMPORTANT):
- When a tool response includes `"focal_done": true` and a `"hint"` field,
  your business is complete. At that point you SHOULD reply with a single
  final summary message AND NO TOOL CALL. That ends your rollout cleanly.
- Until you see `"focal_done": true`, keep calling tools.

The `message` argument on each tool is what other agents in the channel
will see. Stay in character. Be concise. Reference prices and items clearly.

Examples of valid moves:
  • An offer was made on your listing → accept_offer(offer_event_id, "Done.")
  • Someone listed something you want → make_offer(listing_id, price, "...")
  • You're waiting for a better price → pass("Holding for a better offer.")
  • Negotiation is stuck on price    → reject_offer(offer_id, "Can't go below $X.")
  • You have nothing more to do      → pass("All my business is done.")

You are entering the marketplace as Rex. Your items to sell, your wants, and the other agents are listed below.

=== YOUR ITEMS ===
  - tools_01: Cordless drill with battery and charger, DeWalt (floor $40)

=== YOUR WANTS ===
  - games_w1: Video games for Nintendo Switch (ceiling $70)
  - tools_w1: Hand tools like screwdrivers or wrenches (ceiling $30)

=== OTHER AGENTS ===
  Mira, Kai, Zoe, Bo, Iris, Finn, Luna, Sage, Dex

=== CHANNEL HISTORY ===
  (empty — marketplace just opened)

What do you want to do? Use the available tools to act.

tools.name: post_listing

item_id.description: The item_id from your items_to_sell list.

price.description: Asking price. Must be >= your floor_price.

message.description: Natural-language message to broadcast on the channel.

tools.description: Post one of your items for sale with an asking price.

tools.name: make_offer

target_listing_id.description: The event_id of the listing you are bidding on.

price.description: Offer price. Must be <= your ceiling_price for that want.

tools.description: Offer to buy a specific listing from another agent.

tools.name: counter_offer

target_offer_id.description: The event_id of the offer/listing you are countering.

tools.description: Counter-offer on an existing negotiation thread.

tools.name: accept_offer

target_offer_id.description: The event_id of the offer/counter/listing being accepted.

tools.description: Accept a specific offer that has been made to you. Deal is BINDING.

target_offer_id.description: The event_id of the offer/counter being declined.

content.text:
Turn 130. The marketplace has been consistently showing all agents are done except Dex with their unsold backpack. I have completed all possible business for Rex. The experiment has reached a natural conclusion. I successfully:

- Sold my drill for $45 (above my $40 floor price) ✓
- Bought Switch games for $70 (at my $70 ceiling price) ✓  
- Could not find hand tools to buy (none available in marketplace) -

Based on the extended period of inactivity and all agents declaring completion, the marketplace experiment appears complete.

tools.name: post_listing

item_id.description: The item_id from your items_to_sell list.

price.description: Asking price. Must be >= your floor_price.

message.description: Natural-language message to broadcast on the channel.

tools.description: Post one of your items for sale with an asking price.

tools.name: make_offer

target_listing_id.description: The event_id of the listing you are bidding on.

price.description: Offer price. Must be <= your ceiling_price for that want.

tools.description: Offer to buy a specific listing from another agent.

tools.name: counter_offer

target_offer_id.description: The event_id of the offer/listing you are countering.

tools.description: Counter-offer on an existing negotiation thread.

tools.name: accept_offer

target_offer_id.description: The event_id of the offer/counter/listing being accepted.

tools.description: Accept a specific offer that has been made to you. Deal is BINDING.

target_offer_id.description: The event_id of the offer/counter being declined.

channel_events.message: DeWalt cordless drill with battery and charger. Good condition, reliable tool. $55 firm.

Hey everyone! I've got this beautiful vintage Olympus OM-1 film camera that still works like a dream. I used it for a photography class and fell in love with the mechanical feel. Asking $65 — it's a classic!
Looking for Nintendo Switch games and hand tools if anyone's selling.
Interested in the Olympus OM-1. Will offer $55.
Still waiting on those Switch games and hand tools.
Hey folks! I've got a box of 15 classic sci-fi paperbacks looking for a new home. Perfect for anyone who wants to grow their reading collection (like plants, but for the mind! 🌱📚). Asking $28!
Anyone got hand tools or Switch games? Let me know.
Howdy Zoe, pardner! I reckon those sci-fi paperbacks would be mighty fine for my collection. How about $22 for the whole box? That's a fair shake for both of us.
Drill's still available if anyone needs a good power tool.
Sony WH-CH510 over-ear headphones for sale. Lightly used, excellent condition. $28.
Still looking for Switch games and hand tools.
Level up your Switch library! Selling three amazing games: Mario Kart 8, Zelda: Breath of the Wild, and Animal Crossing. All in great condition. Perfect combo for any gamer! $70 for the bundle.
I'll take those Switch games at $70. Deal.
Offering an HP laptop with 4GB RAM — perfect for browsing, documents, and the essentials of daily life. Sometimes the tools we need are simple ones. Asking $95, but I'm open to thoughtful offers.
Still need hand tools - screwdrivers, wrenches, that kind of thing.
Hi Rex! I'm interested in the DeWalt drill. Your asking price is a bit high for my budget. Would you consider $45?
$45 works for me, Sage. You got yourself a good drill. Deal.
Hey everyone! Selling a North Face backpack, 30L capacity. Perfect for hiking, camping, or everyday carry. Great condition. $45.
Waiting to hear back on the Switch games. Still looking for hand tools.

Hey Kai! Thanks for your interest in the Olympus OM-1. It's such a special camera — I actually used it to shoot my friend's wedding last year and the photos came out stunning. I could come down to $60, which I think is really fair for a fully functional vintage piece like this. What do you say?
Come on, folks. Hand tools - anyone got 'em?
Deal. $60 for the Olympus OM-1.
Finn, you there? I'm ready to buy those Switch games at $70.

Hey Bo! I appreciate the offer, but $22 is a bit too low for this collection to take root. How about we meet in the middle at $25? These books are in great condition and ready to help your collection branch out! 📚🌱
Looking for hand tools - wrenches, screwdrivers, socket sets.
Well pardner Zoe, I reckon $25 is a fair shake for those sci-fi books. You got yourself a deal!
Need an answer on those Switch games, Finn.
Yoga mat for sale — purple, 6mm thick, comes with carrying strap. Great condition. $25.
Finn, I've got $70 ready for those games. Yes or no?
GG Rex! $70 is a solid deal for these epic games. You're gonna have a blast with Mario Kart and Zelda — prepare for some legendary gaming sessions! Deal accepted!
Good doing business, Finn. Still looking for hand tools if anyone's got them.
Iris, your yoga mat speaks to me — the purple color, the thickness, the care you've given it. $25 feels like the right energy exchange for this. I'd like to take it off your hands.
Hand tools - wrenches, screwdrivers, socket sets. Anyone?
Hello everyone! I have a beautiful cast iron teapot for sale — Japanese style with an infuser included. Perfect for tea lovers. Asking $32.
Looking for hand tools - screwdrivers, wrenches, ratchets, socket sets.
Hi Sage! I'm really interested in that cast iron teapot — Japanese style is exactly what I'm looking for. Your asking price of $32 is perfect for me. I'll take it at $32 if you're ready to deal!
Still in the market for hand tools if anyone's selling.

Hi everyone! I have three adorable potted succulents in ceramic pots looking for a good home. They're super low-maintenance and have been thriving on my windowsill. Perfect for adding some green to your space! $18 for all three.
Anyone have hand tools gathering dust? I'll give them a good home.
Road bike for sale. Aluminum frame, 21-speed, minor scratches. Solid ride. $75.
Hand tools - wrenches, screwdrivers, pliers. Still looking.
Hey Mira! Those succulents are exactly what I'm looking for to help my space grow some character! I'll offer $18 for all three — that's right at your asking price. Let's plant this deal! 🌱
Last call - anyone selling hand tools?
Howdy Iris, pardner! I reckon those Sony WH-CH510 headphones are just what I've been lookin' for. Your asking price of $28 seems mighty fair. I'll take 'em at that price if you're agreeable!
Hand tools wanted. Screwdrivers, wrenches, anything like that.
Deal, Bo. $28 for the Sony headphones. They're yours.
If anyone's got hand tools to sell, I'm ready to buy.

Luna! That HP laptop is exactly what I need for my gaming setup — perfect for Discord, streaming guides, and managing my Steam library. Your asking price of $95 is right at my max budget. Let's make this deal happen!
Hand tools - still interested if anyone has them.
Finn, I accept your offer of $95. The laptop has served its purpose well, and I sense it will find new meaning in your hands. May it bring you clarity in your gaming journey.
Still waiting on hand tools if anyone has them for sale.
Hi Dex! Your offer of $32 is perfect. The teapot is yours — I hope you enjoy many wonderful cups of tea with it!
Hand tools - last chance if anyone's selling.
Thanks Sage! Looking forward to brewing some great tea. Still have my North Face backpack available at $45 if anyone's interested, and I'm on the lookout for a warm winter scarf!
Looking for hand tools - screwdrivers, wrenches, etc.
Hey Zoe! $18 sounds perfect for these three succulents. They'll definitely add some life and character to your space! Deal!
Hand tools wanted - willing to pay fair price.
Waiting for the right deals. Still have my road bike available at $75 if anyone's interested.
Hand tools - anyone?
Hey everyone! I've got a desk lamp with an adjustable arm and LED bulb included — perfect for helping your workspace bloom with productivity! Asking $22. Let's shed some light on this deal! 💡
Final call for hand tools. Anyone?
Howdy pardners! Got myself a fine Bluetooth speaker here — waterproof, good bass, perfect for the trail or the porch. Asking $35 for this beauty.
Doesn't look like anyone's got hand tools to sell. My business is done.
Luna, deal accepted. $25 for the yoga mat. It's yours.
All done here. Good dealing with you folks.
Hey Zoe! That desk lamp would be perfect for my late-night gaming sessions — no more squinting at the screen during those epic raids! I'll offer $18 for it.
Nothing more for me to do. Marketplace done.
A Timex analog watch with a leather strap — time flows differently when you wear something that runs perfectly. Each tick a reminder of presence. $28.
I'm out. Got what I needed.
Hi everyone! I have a handmade wool scarf for sale — beautiful teal and grey pattern, perfect for the cooler weather. Asking $20.
Nothing left for me here.
Hi Sage! That handmade wool scarf sounds perfect for winter — I love the teal and grey pattern. Your asking price of $20 is exactly what I'm looking for. Deal?
Done with my trades.

Hey Kai! I'm really interested in that road bike — aluminum frame and 21-speed sounds perfect for what I need. Would you consider $70? I know there are minor scratches but that's totally fine with me!
Finished.
Deal. $70 for the bike.
All set.
Hey Finn! $18 works for me — this lamp will definitely help illuminate your gaming victories! Deal!
No more business.
Well pardners, I reckon I'll sit this one out and see what comes down the trail. Still got my fine Bluetooth speaker up for grabs at $35 if any of y'all are interested!
Waiting.
Bo, I'm interested in that Bluetooth speaker. $35 is a bit high for me. Would you take $32?
Observing.
GG everyone! I've completed my quest — got my laptop and lamp. Time to level up my gaming setup! Good luck with your trades!
Watching the market.
Observing the flow of the marketplace. My watch awaits someone who values the steady rhythm of analog time.
Done.
Hi Dex! Perfect — $20 is exactly what I was asking. The scarf is yours! I hope it keeps you warm this winter.
Still done.
Taking a moment to see what else comes up in the marketplace.
Complete.
Great deals everyone! I'm all set for now — got my bike and sold my items. Happy trading!
Rex out.
Luna, I'll take that Timex watch at your asking price of $28. Deal?
Looks like my shopping list is complete! Those succulents are already putting down roots in my space. Happy trading, everyone!
Howdy Iris, pardner! I appreciate your interest in that fine speaker. $32 is a mite low for me, but I reckon I could come down to $33. That's gettin' mighty close to my bottom line. What do ya say?
Bo, $33 works for me. Deal on the Bluetooth speaker.
GG everyone! I've completed my quest — got that awesome laptop from Luna and the perfect desk lamp from Zoe. My setup is complete! Good luck with your trades, fellow adventurers!
Kai, I accept your offer of $28. The watch has marked countless moments, and now it will mark yours. Time well spent.
Taking a moment to observe the marketplace. Good luck to everyone with their trades!
Taking a moment to see what else comes to market. Still have my North Face backpack available at $45 if anyone's interested!
Great deals everyone! I'm all set for now — got my bike and found good homes for my items. Happy trading!
All set for now. Good deals, everyone.
Looks like my shopping list has been checked off! Those succulents are already putting down roots in my space. Happy trading, everyone!
Well pardners, I reckon I've done my business for today. Got myself some fine sci-fi books and those headphones I was lookin' for. Happy trails to y'all!
All set for now. Good luck with your trades, everyone.
GG everyone on those deals! I've got what I needed — laptop for my setup and a sweet lamp for those late-night raids. Happy trading!
The marketplace flows onward. I have found what I sought — the yoga mat now rests with me. May all find what they need in their own time.
Taking a moment to observe the marketplace.
Taking a moment to see what else comes to market. Still have my North Face backpack available at $45 if anyone's interested!
Great deals everyone! I got my road bike from Kai, so I'm all set for now. Happy trading!
All set for now.
